titleStmt.title: SII 28.20: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 20. (A.R. No. 20 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records an undertaking by three of the śivabrāhmanṇas (same as in No. 19 above) of the temple of Tirukkuraṅkāḍutuṟai-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār to provide 10 arecanuts and 20 betal leaves daily for the tiruvattachāmachchandhi (midnight worship) of Nāchchiyār with the interest on 17 kāśu endowed by a Vēḷān, resident of Āṟagaḷūr un Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Milāḍu alias Ja[na*]nātha-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājādhirāja devaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu milāṭakiya jananāta vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷūrilirukkum pa ṉṟi kā ma teva veḷān pakkal Iṟaivāṉ puñcaiyāṉa tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil civappirāmaṇaril pālāciriyaṉ piccan caṉtiracekaranāna nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭanum pāratāyaṉ rājaciṅka mādevanāna dakṣaṇā
mutti paṇṭitanum pālāciriyaṉ kanṟu meccāna Ātitta tevanāna tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭanum Immūvomum Upayam celuttak kaṭavomāka kaikkoṇṭa kācu 10 7 m Ikkācu patinneḻālum vanta viruttikoṇṭu nācciyār tiruvatta cāmattukku paḷḷiyaWritten below the line.ṟaic [ candhi] kku Ottinavāṟe nāḷoṉṟukku pattu pākkum Irupatu veṟṟilaiyuWritten below the line.m Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 28.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
